name: Madras Chicken Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine sour cream or yogurt and chutney until well blended; set aside.
2. In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Add onion, bell pepper, celery, and apple to the skillet. Cook until the onion is soft but not browned.
4. Stir in curry powder and cook for one minute.
5. Add chopped chicken and cook for three minutes or until heated through.
6. Stir in the sour cream/chutney mixture. Cook for an additional minute.
7. Remove the skillet from heat, but keep it warm.
8. Toast hamburger buns.
9. Spoon half of the chicken mixture onto each bun.
10. Makes 4 sandwiches.
Note: I prefer to serve this over hot cooked egg noodles or fettuccine.
